name: My Yellow School Bus
principals: Joseph Lamarque (listed in source data as 'Other')
recent_news: No corroborating web presence found; not in Louisiana SOS search results, no website, no charter directory listing as of June 2026.
fit_notes: Tiny New Orleans operation (~28 employees, ~$1.5M revenue) at a residential-style Algiers address; unverifiable online. If real, too small/opaque for direct tuck-in without sourcing call.

name: East Coast School Bus Inc
recent_news: Not found in NJ School Bus Contractors Association directory or NJ DOE 2020-21/2021-22 contractor lists; no standalone website discoverable.
fit_notes: Listed address is a Port Imperial waterfront area in West New York (Hudson County); no corroborating school-bus contractor identity. Likely too small/unverifiable to pursue without direct sourcing.

name: Pervine LTD Which Will Do Bus
recent_news: Name appears to be a data-broker registration artifact ('which will do business as...'). Listed address 3820 Soundview Dr W is a 2,381 sqft residential single-family home (built 1956); only registered entities there per Bizprofile are 'Blue Wind Productions' and 'Pamela Reed Productions' - neither bus-related.
fit_notes: Almost certainly not an operating school-bus contractor; appears to be a misclassified business listing at a residential address. NOT a tuck-in candidate.

name: Mc Gough Bus Co Inc
districts_or_customers: Private, parochial, and charter schools across Southern New Jersey (Camden and Gloucester counties)
recent_news: Multi-generational family business; daughter Meghan McGough Paster (Widener '06) now COO, with third generation positioned to follow per NJBIA profile. Phone (856) 232-3300 matches the Glassboro/Sewell footprint; HQ at 4121 Route 42 South, Turnersville, NJ. Specializes in special-needs PreK-12 transport to private/parochial/charter schools across South Jersey. (Note: source's 'employees=27' appears understated given 135-vehicle fleet.)
fit_notes: Attractive South Jersey tuck-in: independent family operator with ~135 buses, special-needs focus (high-margin), strong Catholic/charter school relationships, and active second-generation leadership with third-gen still young - succession is not imminent but positioning matters. Camden/Gloucester footprint complementary to any existing Summit NJ presence.

name: Z Bus Svc LLC
recent_news: Not the same as Chattanooga Bus Company LLC (which is at 2731 Calhoun Ave / Apison, owned by Dominic D'Amico, ex-Durham). No FMCSA snapshot or media coverage found for 'Z Bus Svc' at 1217 Reeves Ave; Hamilton County Schools is contracted with First Student for ~20,000 students.
fit_notes: Unverifiable small Chattanooga operator. Hamilton County's main district business is held by First Student, so any independent here is likely a private/charter/daycare niche operator. Needs direct outreach to qualify.
